description_long: This object consists of a modern double-sink bathroom vanity unit paired with two tall, slim storage cabinets. The vanity features two square white ceramic sinks set into a light wood countertop, with two wide drawers beneath each sink for storage. The tall cabinets are sleek and rectangular, with a combination of white and light wood finishes, and each has a horizontal handle for opening. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a smooth, matte finish, suitable for contemporary urban interiors. The cabinetry appears to be constructed from engineered wood or MDF with a laminate or painted surface, and the sinks are likely ceramic. The set is designed to provide ample storage and surface space in a bathroom or washroom setting.
description: A modern double-sink vanity with two tall, slim storage cabinets, featuring white and light wood finishes and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of the vanity and one tall cabinet, highlighting the depth and layered construction.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both sinks, drawers, and the full height of the two tall cabinets, emphasizing the storage and functional layout.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the slim profile of the tall cabinet and the vanity, with the wood and white finishes visible.
description_view_3: Rear or underside view revealing the plumbing beneath the sinks and the back panels of the cabinets, with open drawers visible.
